caption: Solar tab — vitals + climate + peak load + forecast accuracy
Outdoor tab — weather, tides, marine, sunset, sky tonight, meteor showers
Safety tab — earthquakes, storms, UV & heat, air quality
Travel tab — trip planner, border wait times, fuel prices with live Pemex data
Community tab — events, HOA activities, news, Spanish practice
Solar Vitals — SoC, PV per string, load breakdown, per-AC override, per-room temp/humidity
Room Climate History — 24h/3d/7d temp + humidity with hover crosshair
Water Tank — gallons + days-remaining projection with tiered warning bar
Peak Load — rolling 30-day max simultaneous house load
AC vs PV Overlay — 24h of PV production against smart_ac consumption
Sky Tonight — naked-eye planets tonight + moon phase, computed locally
Settings → System — location map picker + external service URLs and tokens
Settings → Notifications — per-source enable, quiet hours, test-fire, history + replay
Settings → HA Integrations — per-widget entity pickers with live values from Home Assistant
Settings → Rotation — fullscreen 'screensaver' widget rotation with per-step dwell
Air Quality — US AQI + PM2.5/PM10/ozone/dust + 24h peak. Source: Open-Meteo.
Earthquakes — recent felt quakes (M ≥ 2.5) within a configurable radius. Source: USGS.
Tropical storms — active NHC cyclones, filtered to configured basins (default EP).
UV & heat — peak UV time + apparent-temperature danger window today and tomorrow.
Weather — current conditions + 7-day forecast (Open-Meteo).
Tide tables — highs/lows from the tidetime.org scraper (no API key).
Marine — wave height, wind, sea temperature + 'best window' hint.
Sea surface temp — current + 7-day forecast + swim/fishing context.
Sun & moon — sunrise/sunset/solar noon + moon phase (local math, no API).
Sunset countdown — live-ticking minutes to sunset with 'golden 20' highlight.
Fishing windows — best hours today/tomorrow from tide movement + dawn/dusk + sea state.
Whale watching season — Sea of Cortez fin/blue/gray whale indicator.
Meteor showers — next shower peak with ZHR + hint. Announces N days before.
Bird migration — species currently moving through the Baja Pacific Flyway.
Border wait times — CBP data for US-Mexico crossings.
Fuel prices — real CA retail avg from EIA + live per-station Pemex from CRE + manual Costco.
Return countdown — days to your next drive back north.
MXN/USD — daily rate from Frankfurter (ECB) with a 14-day trailing series.
Drive times — OSRM distance + duration between configured points.
Mexican holidays — federal public holidays with next-holiday countdown.
Trip planner — daily 'go-score' combining drive time + border wait + weather.
Consumption YoY — today's load vs. same-day-last-year from EG4 history.
Forecast accuracy — 30 days of forecast vs actual PV; tune peak_kw when biased.
Property mode — Occupied / Vacant / Arriving date; other widgets adjust off this.
Excess-energy planner — today's expected surplus + suggested loads for midday.
Pre-cool advisor — window based on apparent-temperature peak and current SoC.
When to run — best contiguous window today/tomorrow per configured high-load appliance.
Baja news — configurable regional RSS/Atom outlets.
Baja races — SCORE International off-road schedule with ★ for SF-involved events.
HOA newsletter — latest El Dorado Ranch weekly PDF, auto-scraped.
El Dorado Ranch activities — auto-parsed weekly activities PDF.
News — configurable RSS/Atom feeds (defaults: NHC + USGS).
Property tax — San Felipe predial countdown with paid-this-year toggle.
Reservations — upcoming bookings from configured iCal URLs.
Spanish practice — daily phrase, speak button (via pi5 TTS), and dictation quiz.
Border crossing log — every crossing with direction, port, actual vs quoted wait, notes.
Contacts — address book (name/phone/email/location) shared with the phone.
Quick links — grouped bookmarks. Ships an 'Apps' group with smart_ac + HA.
Shopping list — items to buy in the US on your next border run.
Todo — priority (1..5), optional due date, done flag, notes. Syncs to Sheets when enabled.
Rotation mode — full-screen kiosk view walking through configured widgets
Mobile viewport — same widgets, 1-column grid
